eval_cases.description: Multiple articles about catastrophic flooding near electronics factories in Thailand. All articles consistently negative.

articles.raw_text: Catastrophic flooding in Thailand has completely submerged three major electronics factories in the eastern industrial zone, halting all production with no resumption date set. Thousands of workers have been displaced.
Thailand flood damage to electronics supply chain estimated at 2 billion dollars. Component shortages expected to hit global manufacturers within two weeks as factory recovery efforts remain stalled.

Emergency response teams continue efforts at flooded semiconductor plants in Thailand. Industry analysts warn of 6 to 8 week production delays affecting downstream electronics assembly lines worldwide.

eval_cases.description: Multiple routine performance articles with no disruption signals. All articles positive or neutral.

articles.raw_text: Gamma Auto Parts submitted their Q2 performance report showing stable output levels and an on-time delivery rate of 98 percent with no operational disruptions reported this quarter.
Vietnam automotive supplier Gamma Auto Parts announces expansion of production capacity with two new assembly lines opening next quarter, citing strong demand and stable operations.

eval_cases.description: Multiple articles about an ongoing port strike in Bangladesh causing shipping delays for textile exporters.

articles.raw_text: Dock workers at the Port of Bangladesh have entered their third week of strike action, causing significant shipping delays for textile exporters and disrupting global apparel supply chains.
Bangladesh port strike shows no signs of resolution as union demands remain unmet. Shipping delays now affecting over 200 apparel manufacturers dependent on Chittagong port for exports.
International brands sourcing from Bangladesh report growing concern over port strike impact. Several buyers have begun contingency planning with alternative sourcing regions.

eval_cases.description: Multiple articles confirming a supplier bankruptcy filing with financial distress signals across all articles.

articles.raw_text: Vietnam automotive parts manufacturer Delta Components has filed for bankruptcy protection following months of financial losses and severe supply shortages that left the company unable to meet production commitments.

Creditors of Delta Components meet to assess recovery options after bankruptcy filing. Outstanding purchase orders worth 40 million dollars remain unfulfilled, leaving downstream automotive assemblers scrambling for alternative suppliers.
